title: Further Addendum to Selection Criteria for Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships
indian_angle: This update directly impacts Indian junior players aspiring to represent the country at the Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships.
summary: BAI has issued a further addendum to the selection criteria for the upcoming Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships 2026, detailing updated guidelines for player participation.

title: Advisory Issued on Unauthorized Badminton Leagues and Tournaments
indian_angle: The advisory from BAI warns Indian players and stakeholders about participating in unauthorized badminton leagues and tournaments, emphasizing official sanctioning.
summary: BAI has released an advisory regarding unauthorized badminton leagues, tournaments, and championships, urging players and officials to ensure events are properly sanctioned.

title: Grassroot Level Coaches Development Program Announced for Guwahati & Raipur
indian_angle: This program aims to enhance coaching standards at the grassroots level in India, fostering future badminton talent across the country.
summary: A Coaches Development Program for the grassroot level is scheduled for NCE Guwahati & Raipur from July 15th to 24th, 2026, focusing on enhancing coaching skills.

title: Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Tournament in Chennai
indian_angle: This is a key domestic ranking tournament for Indian senior players, offering crucial points and competition experience.
summary: The Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Badminton Tournament 2026 will be held in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, from July 16th to 23rd, 2026, as per a recent BAI circular.

title: Thomas Cup Squad Reassembles for Asian Games; Treesa-Gayatri Return
indian_angle: The reassembly of the Thomas Cup squad, including the return of Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand, is crucial for India's medal hopes at the upcoming Asian Games.
summary: The Indian Thomas Cup squad is reassembling for the Asian Games, with Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand making their return to the team setup.
